name: Arachne, Mother of Threads
core effect: Once per turn, you may remove or add a threadmark counter to a threadmarked summon
control effect: Once per opponent's turn, you may pay 2 vitality to add a threadmark counter to a summon they play
energy effect: At the end of each one of your turns, if no decay counters were gained, a threadmarked summon gains Echo 1
flavor: Even broken strands return to the loom of time.
